posts.caption:
Suno's training data just got exposed — and it's a long list. A supply chain hack revealed source code showing the AI music generator scraped audio from YouTube, Deezer, and podcasts. Record labels already suing Suno say this confirms DMCA violations; Suno is holding firm on a fair-use defense.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIMusic #Suno #DMCA #AIRights #MusicIndustry #ArtificialIntelligence

story.title: Hack reveals Suno scraped YouTube, Deezer, and podcasts for AI training
story.dek: A supply chain attack exposed source code showing the AI music generator harvested audio from multiple platforms. Record labels argue this violates the DMCA despite Suno's fair-use defense.

posts.caption:
Patreon just upgraded from politely asking AI bots not to scrape — to actually stopping them. The platform is now using Cloudflare to actively deny access to AI training crawlers, moving past robots.txt guidelines that sophisticated bots increasingly ignore. It's a meaningful shift in how creator platforms defend their content at the infrastructure level.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio

#Patreon #AIRights #CreatorEconomy #AIScraping #AIPolicy

story.title: Patreon blocks AI scraping with Cloudflare enforcement
story.dek: Patreon is actively blocking AI training bots via Cloudflare, shifting from passive robots.txt rules to direct access denial as scraping tactics grow more sophisticated.

posts.caption:
TikTok is testing an opt-in tool that scans for AI-generated likenesses of creators — detecting synthetic impersonation and giving creators a path to report it. The move mirrors YouTube's existing detection capability, signaling that likeness protection is becoming a platform standard. Full brief + story details: link in bio.

#TikTok #AIRights #CreatorEconomy #AIDetection #SyntheticMedia

story.title: TikTok testing AI likeness detection tool for creators
story.dek: TikTok is piloting an opt-in tool to detect AI-generated likenesses of creators and enable reporting. The feature mirrors YouTube's similar detection capability, offering creators protection against synthetic impersonation.

posts.caption:
Google just open-sourced GNM Head — a parametric 3D human head model with 170+ controls for expression, pose, and facial variation. Trained on real 3D scans, it ships with a free Blender add-on, making photorealistic head generation accessible to anyone building characters or avatars.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AI #3D #Blender #GoogleAI #CharacterDesign #AITools

story.title: Google open-sources GNM Head, parametric 3D human head model
story.dek: Google releases generative anthropomorphic 3D head model (170+ controls, expression/pose adjustable) with free Blender add-on; trained on 3D scans, not AI-generated but explicitly generative for facial variation.

posts.caption:
NVIDIA and Hugging Face just dropped NeMo Automodel — a joint framework for fine-tuning video and image diffusion models at scale. It ships with support for FLUX checkpoints and LoRA examples out of the box, making large-scale visual model training meaningfully more accessible. This is infrastructure-level news for anyone building in the image or video generation space.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AITools #NVIDIA #HuggingFace #DiffusionModels #VideoAI #GenerativeAI

story.title: NVIDIA NeMo Automodel enables large-scale video and image model fine-tuning
story.dek: NVIDIA and Hugging Face joint effort adds fine-tuning at scale for video and image diffusion models, including support for FLUX checkpoints and LoRA examples.

posts.caption:
Moonshot AI just dropped Kimi K3 — an open-source model from China that benchmarks alongside Claude and GPT-4-class systems. Markets moved the moment analysts started paying attention. The geopolitical read on this one is as loud as the technical specs.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AI #OpenSource #KimiK3 #MoonshotAI #AINews #FrontierAI

story.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 reaches frontier performance, rattles markets
story.dek: Chinese company Moonshot AI released an open-source model rivaling Claude and GPT, drawing competitive analysis and sparking concerns about geopolitical AI dynamics. Market reaction was immediate.
